title: Basics
subtitle: Logging, terminal, notifications, and launch at login

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete theme "{{name}}"?
appearance.languageRowHint: Choose one language pack as the active UI language.
appearance.systemThemeDescription: Use light or dark theme based on your OS appearance. Updates when the system switches.

bitfun-light.name: Light
bitfun-light.description: Light theme - Elegant and refined, soft blue-gray tones

bitfun-midnight.name: Midnight
bitfun-midnight.description: Midnight gray dark theme - Professional and elegant, inspired by JetBrains IDE

bitfun-china-style.name: Ink Charm
bitfun-china-style.description: Chinese style theme - Rice paper and ink, blue and vermilion, warm and elegant

bitfun-china-night.name: Ink Night
bitfun-china-night.description: Chinese dark theme - Starlit ink night, moonlight like water, serene and elegant

bitfun-cyber.name: Cyber
bitfun-cyber.description: Tech-style theme - Deep black hole, neon future, ultimate tech aesthetics

bitfun-slate.name: Slate
bitfun-slate.description: Slate gray geometric theme - Deep immersion, high contrast grayscale aesthetics

bitfun-tokyo-night.name: Tokyo Night
bitfun-tokyo-night.description: Popular Tokyo Night palette - Indigo night, blue and violet highlights

fontSize.title: Font Size
fontSize.hint: Adjust font size for the UI and chat area (editor font is configured in the editor settings).
fontSize.uiSizeHint: Controls font size across navigation, panels, settings, and all other UI elements.
fontSize.customPxOutOfRange: Please enter an integer between 12 and 20
fontSize.previewText: BitFun is an AI-driven programming environment. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
fontSize.flowChatHint: When off, chat uses UI +1 px and tracks UI presets. When on, pick a size (12–20 px) from the list below.

sections.title: Updates
sections.hint: Check for new versions after startup

autoUpdate.toggleDescription: When enabled, BitFun may prompt you shortly after launch if a newer version is available. Manual check from About is always available.

sections.title: Login
sections.hint: Start BitFun when you sign in to this account

launchAtLogin.toggleDescription: Automatically start BitFun after you log in. Exact behavior depends on your operating system.

sections.loggingHint: Log level and directory for this session

level.description: Controls log verbosity in real time. Changes apply immediately.

sensitiveDiagnostics.label: Include sensitive diagnostic data
sensitiveDiagnostics.description: When enabled, local logs may include prompts, model request and response payloads, tool arguments, file paths, and webview event payloads for troubleshooting. BitFun does not upload these log files automatically.

path.description: Directory where log files for this run are written.

diagnostics.label: Diagnostics Bundle
diagnostics.description: Export recent local logs, crash reports, and runtime metadata as a zip file. BitFun does not upload it automatically.

previousCrash.title: Previous session ended unexpectedly
previousCrash.description: Last session logs are available at {{path}}.

previousUncleanShutdown.title: Previous session did not record a normal shutdown
previousUncleanShutdown.description: Last session logs are available at {{path}}. This can happen after a restart, system shutdown, or development reload.

startupRecovery.title: Previous session ended unexpectedly
startupRecovery.message: BitFun found a crash report from the previous session. You can export diagnostics if you want to report the issue.

actions.openFolderTooltip: Open log folder in file explorer

sections.terminalHint: Default shell and new terminal behavior

controls.description: Default shell type for new terminals and for agent command execution in local workspaces.

panelPosition.label: Open terminal in
panelPosition.description: Where terminal tabs open when launched from the Shell navigation in a session

sections.title: Window Behavior
sections.hint: What happens when the close button is clicked

windowBehavior.closeButtonDescription: Default action when the window close button (×) is clicked.

messages.loadFailed: Failed to read window behavior settings
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save window behavior settings

dialogCompletion.label: Task completion notification
dialogCompletion.description: Show a toast notification when an AI task completes while the window is not in focus

startupTips.label: Show tips on startup
startupTips.description: Display a usage tip card each time the app starts to help you discover features
